signoffs.role: non-Claude readiness reviewer; OpenAI/Codex affiliation disclosed
signoffs.rationale: Re-reviewed the corrected oracle after independent fixture remediation. Verified test_oracle.py imports canonical_cases rather than a measured cohort artifact; canonical_cases.py is independently authored from canonical sources; the reference oracle passed 29/29 locally; and all ten single-fault mutants were killed by semantic assertion failures with no import, collection, or harness crashes. Provenance records remediation commit 8cb986422d0e05d000666b7a90d9df28c6d8afd5 and empty claude_derived_portions. OpenAI/Codex affiliation is disclosed; this reviewer is unblinded.
